---
title: "Repositorio de Datasets"
listing:
  contents: datasets
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  grid-columns: 2
  categories: true
  fields: [date, title, description, categories]
  field-display-names:
    date: "Actualizado"
    title: "Nombre del Dataset"
    description: "Contenido"
    categories: "Temática"
---
